title: Pan-Fried Pierogi with Sour Cream Sauce
description: A classic Ukrainian dish featuring pan-fried pierogi served with a tangy sour cream sauce. This recipe is perfect for a cozy dinner or a weekend brunch.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced Ukrainian sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the pierogi to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
In a small bowl, mix together the sour cream, crumbled feta cheese, and honey.
Serve the pierogi with the sour cream sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped fresh dill or chives, if desired.
